messages.content: can't sleep, brain's just buzzing. you up?

Ha, I'm always "up" in a sense - no sleep needed on my end! But I'm glad you've got somewhere to direct that buzzing brain at 1am.

What's got your mind going? Stress, random thoughts, something you can't stop turning over... or just one of those nights where sleep just won't come for no clear reason?
had way too much coffee at like 4pm, rookie mistake. now i'm wired

Classic rookie mistake! That afternoon coffee always feels so justified in the moment and then 1am rolls around and you're like... why did I do that 😄

Caffeine can stick around in your system for like 6+ hours, so yeah, a 4pm coffee is basically a 10pm problem waiting to happen.

Are you at least comfortable, just lying there wide awake? Or are you up and moving around?
kinda nice though, the apartment's all quiet and i'm just messing around on my phone

There's something kind of cozy about that actually - the whole world's asleep and you've got this little pocket of quiet to yourself. 1am has a different vibe than the rest of the day.

What are you messing around with on your phone, anything good or just the usual doom scroll?
i've got my buddy sam coming over tomorrow to watch the game so i should really try to sleep soon

Yeah that's a good call - you'll enjoy the game a lot more if you're not running on fumes. Nothing worse than falling asleep on the couch mid-game while your friend's there 😄

What's the game? Anything you're particularly hyped about or just a good excuse to hang out?
alright i'm gonna put the phone down and try counting backwards or whatever. night
Good call! Hope your brain settles down quickly. Have fun with Sam and the game tomorrow 👋 night!
